concerns.text: Plan lists quickstart.md, data-model.md, research.md as Phase 1/Phase 0 outputs but no tasks create these files (only T054 validates quickstart.md if present). Missing implementation tasks for plan deliverables.
Plan lists contracts/ directory in project structure but no tasks create contract files. Missing implementation tasks for plan deliverables.

FR-003 requires algorithm validation against primary mathematical literature (Birman-Menasco 1988, Seifert 1934, Schubert 1956). Tasks T021-T022 validate against KnotInfo but no task explicitly verifies against primary literature definitions per Constitution Principle VI.
Constitution Principle II requires Reference-Validator Agent integration for DOI reachability/title-token-overlap ≥0.7. No tasks implement this verification workflow.

Constitution Principle V requires content hash generation for artifacts and state file update logic for artifact changes. No tasks implement state file updates or artifact hash tracking beyond T005's checksum utility.
